nodes.label: Login Screen Wireframe
nodes.description: Mobile login/authentication screen in Portuguese. Displays the PromptLab mascot cat at top, the PromptLab brand name, email and password fields (labeled 'Seu e-mail' and 'Sua senha'), a forgot-password link ('Esqueci minha senha'), a primary 'Entrar' (Login) button, social OAuth options (Google, Apple, email), a sign-up link ('Crie agora'), and the help-cat widget in the bottom-right corner.
